overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded character navigating through historic Middle Eastern architecture including covered colonnades, garden courtyards with fountains, and bustling market streets on a bright sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered colonnade walkway transitioning to garden

events.description: exits covered colonnade into open garden courtyard

agents.ego_description: hooded character running through covered walkway toward garden exit

entered.detail: tall sandstone columns supporting the covered walkway roof
wooden beam ceiling providing shade over the walkway
trimmed green hedges marking the garden boundary ahead
large terracotta pots with flowering plants

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a covered stone colonnade with tall pillars on either side, transitioning from shaded walkway to a sunlit garden area. The space is narrow and enclosed with wooden roofing overhead, opening up to reveal palm trees and garden hedges ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden courtyard with central domed pavilion

agents.ego_description: approaching and circling the central domed fountain structure

notable_agents.action: sitting on stone bench near the fountain

entered.detail: octagonal stone pavilion with ornate dome and arched openings
multi-tiered stone fountain with water flowing under the pavilion
carved stone seating arranged around the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide garden courtyard dominated by a beautiful domed pavilion with a central fountain. The space is open to the sky with dappled sunlight filtering through trees. NPCs sit on stone benches around the perimeter as the character runs toward and circles the fountain structure.

events.description: passes through stone archway into narrow market street

agents.ego_description: running past the rectangular pool and through the exit archway

notable_agents.action: sitting on bench beside the pool

entered.detail: large rectangular stone basin with central water feature
ornate arched gateway marking the exit from the courtyard
decorative metal fence enclosing the garden area

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a secondary courtyard featuring a rectangular reflecting pool surrounded by stone walls. The character heads toward an ornate stone archway that serves as the exit, passing NPCs resting on benches before transitioning through the gateway.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow market street with wooden stalls

events.description: exits archway into bustling market street with vendor stalls

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow market street with vendors and shoppers

notable_agents.action: walking toward the character in the narrow path

entered.detail: wooden vendor stalls with fabric awnings selling goods
traditional adobe structures with wooden balconies
colorful carpets and fabrics draped over stall frames
scaffolding and wooden fencing along the path

segments.scene_description: Passing through the stone archway, the character enters a narrow market street lined with wooden vendor stalls and mud-brick buildings. Colorful textiles hang from the stalls as the character weaves through moderate pedestrian traffic on the dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open village square with carts and market activity

agents.ego_description: running through open village square with scattered groups of people

notable_agents.action: standing near wooden cart observing the market

entered.detail: large wooden wheeled carts loaded with goods and baskets
green fabric canopies providing shade for market stalls
covered well structure in the center of the square

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide village square featuring wooden carts, market awnings, and a central well structure. The open cobblestone area is populated with moderate crowds of villagers walking and gathering near the market stalls under the bright midday sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the shaded seclusion of a stone colonnade into the bright, bustling energy of a village market square. It begins within a narrow, roofed walkway of tall pillars, moving forward as the enclosure opens up to reveal a sunlit garden filled with palm trees and hedges. The scene then expands into a wide courtyard where the camera circles a domed pavilion and central fountain before gliding through a secondary area featuring a rectangular reflecting pool and resting NPCs. As the character passes through an ornate stone archway, the environment shifts abruptly from the quiet gardens to a narrow market street lined with mud-brick buildings and colorful textiles. Finally, the path opens into a wide cobblestone square populated by crowds of villagers and wooden carts under the brilliant midday sun.
